# Regex fixtures for skill: supply-chain-investigation
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# Priority-40 skill: a false fire dominates a domain slot. NO_MATCH lines are
# generic dependency/security prose, mostly with trigger-adjacent tokens.

MATCH: was the npm package compromised in the latest attack
MATCH: check if our dependency was typosquatted
MATCH: supply chain attack on the registry
MATCH: is our org impacted by the compromised maven release
MATCH: the package lock file was tampered with

NO_MATCH: upgrade the lodash dependency to the latest version
NO_MATCH: run a security scan on the docker image
NO_MATCH: the api response was malicious looking json
NO_MATCH: npm install fails behind the proxy
NO_MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
